meaning: n.恰帕斯(墨西哥南部一州)
examples: In Mexico, the Chiapas sheep are at risk of disappearing.
By the time the Spanish got to Chiapas in the 16th century, the Maya had abandoned the city.
The dry forests of southern Chiapas and Yucatán require expert management which is beyond the local indígenas.
Voters will elect governors in the states of Chiapas, Guanajuato, Jalisco, Morelos, Tabasco and Yucatan.
The Catholic church has urged the new minister to consult its bishops in Chiapas.
